title: The D.B. Cooper Case Revisited

segments.text: In 1971, D.B. Cooper hijacked a plane and vanished into thin air.
He extorted $200,000 and parachuted away into the night.
Despite extensive searches, his fate remains a mystery.
Numerous theories suggest various identities and outcomes.
The case continues to intrigue both the public and experts.
A legendary case of an elusive hijacker.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1971, D.B. Cooper hijacked a plane and was never found. Follow for daily cold cases! ✈️
